race.comment: JE REVE (3) should be improved after his first run back from a spell when beaten only two lengths over 1000m at the Sunshine Coast. This looks a suitable race and he can take plenty of benefit from that return. PRINCE OF DIAMONDS (8) has been racing consistently and again performed well when runner-up over 1200m at Nanango last time. He deserves a breakthrough victory on recent form. Last-start maiden winner ELEGANT LUCY (16) has found form and can make her presence felt again despite the rise in grade, while POWERFUL WARRIOR (15) wasn't beaten far at Nanango most recently and has claims of sneaking into the minor money.
